metcon.name: CrossFit Games Open 26.1: Scaled (Ages 16-54) & Scaled Teenagers (14-15)

18 Box Jump-Overs

hypertrophy.reasoning: Prioritize posterior chain balance and arm work while sparing quads/glutes/shoulders from additional volume stress.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Metcon: CrossFit Games Open 26.1: Scaled (Ages 16-54) & Scaled Teenagers (14-15). For Time, 12 min cap: 20 Wall Ball Shots, 18 Box Jump-Overs, 30 Wall Ball Shots, 18 Box Jump-Overs, 40 Wall Ball Shots. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, hamstrings.
